meta.incident: Recommendations service memory pressure -> OOM killed (process exceeded memory quota) -> 502s upstream -> stale cache then 503s on feeds endpoint, amid recurring deprecated-endpoint-called distractors

ground_truth.desc: Memory climbing above threshold on recommendations service

ground_truth.needle: recommendations service oom killed: process exceeded memory quota
fallback cache expired, no recommendations available
